title: MSN 1849 (M) Amendment 1 MLC, 2006 on-board complaint procedures
body: "This notice should be read with the Merchant Shipping (Maritime Labour Convention) (Survey and Certification) Regulations 2013 (S.I. No. 2013/1785) and replaces MSN 1849 (M).  Amendment 1 updates reference information only.  Notice to   ship owners operators masters officers and all seafarers on merchant ships and large yachts.  "
